Class Healing

java.lang.Object
Consumable
Healing
public class Healing extends Consumable
Class file for the Buff class, this is a subclass of the abstract Consumable class

Healing type consumables restore a set HP value to the holder.

This restored HP value can exceed the holder's maximum HP e.g. healing a 98 HP player for 20 HP will set their current HP to 118 exceeding the maximum 100 HP

See Also:

    void
    useConsumable(Entity holder, Entity target)
    Concrete implementation of the useConsumable method Every time a consumable is used, its remaining charges are decremented If a consumable with no remaining charges is used, nothing happens

  • Constructor Details

    • Healing

      public Healing(String name, ImageIcon image, int maxCharges, int healingValue)
      Constructor for the healing class
      Parameters:
      name - name of the healing iterm, all names are assumed valid
      image - image of the healing item
      maxCharges - amount of times the healing item can be used in a battle, all values are assumed valid
      healingValue - amount of HP restored by the healing item, all values are assumed valid

  • Method Details

    • useConsumable

      public void useConsumable(Entity holder, Entity target)
      Concrete implementation of the useConsumable method Every time a consumable is used, its remaining charges are decremented If a consumable with no remaining charges is used, nothing happens
      Specified by:
      useConsumable in class Consumable
      Parameters:
      holder - entity object using the consumable
      target - entity object targeted by the consumable
